name: codex-agent-legion
description: A local Codex-centered multi-agent planning console with machine-readable dispatch contracts.

scripts.check:json: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const d of ['config','schemas','examples']) for (const f of fs.readdirSync(d)) if (f.endsWith('.json')) JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(d+'/'+f,'utf8'));"
scripts.plan:demo: node tools/legionctl.js plan "给这个仓库做一次代码审查" --json
scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:json && npm run doctor
